    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[AuthenticationSource], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreationTime], [a].[CreatorUserId], [a].[DeleterUserId], [a].[DeletionTime], [a].[EmailAddress], [a].[EmailConfirmationCode], [a].[IsActive], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[IsEmailConfirmed], [a].[IsLockoutEnabled], [a].[IsPhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[IsTwoFactorEnabled], [a].[LastModificationTime], [a].[LastModifierUserId], [a].[LockoutEndDateUtc], [a].[Name], [a].[NormalizedEmailAddress], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[Password], [a].[PasswordResetCode], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[Surname], [a].[TenantId], [a].[UserName]

    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]

    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[RoleId], [a0].[TenantId], [a0].[UserId]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [t].[UserName], [t].[Id]

    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[CreationTime], [a].[CreatorUserId], [a].[DeleterUserId], [a].[DeletionTime], [a].[Description], [a].[DisplayName], [a].[IsDefault], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[IsStatic], [a].[LastModificationTime], [a].[LastModifierUserId], [a].[Name], [a].[NormalizedName], [a].[TenantId]

    ORDER BY [a].[DisplayName]
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[CreationTime], [a0].[CreatorUserId], [a0].[Discriminator], [a0].[IsGranted], [a0].[Name], [a0].[TenantId], [a0].[RoleId]
